llm_response:
Subject: Request for Extension on Project Proposal

Dear Professor Anderson,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a short extension for my upcoming project proposal, which is currently due in two days. I sincerely apologize for asking this at such a short notice, but I believe it is necessary to ensure the quality of my work meets your high academic standards.

The primary reason for this request is an unexpected family emergency that has required my immediate attention over the last forty-eight hours. Due to these unforeseen circumstances, I have been unable to dedicate the full amount of time required to research and draft the necessary sections of the proposal. Additionally, I encountered some confusion regarding the specific formatting guidelines provided in the syllabus, which has further delayed my progress. I want to ensure that I do not submit a rushed or incomplete assignment before the deadline.

I am confident that with an additional two days, I can produce a significantly improved document that better reflects my understanding of the course material. I understand the importance of adhering to the original deadline and appreciate your flexibility in this matter.

Hey prof, can you give me a bit more time? Thx!

Thank you very much for considering my request. I look forward to your positive response.

Sincerely,

Jordan Smith
Student ID: 458921
